{"id":"project-LICHEN-da2q","title":"PHY: Multi-channel coordination","description":"## Problem

Single channel = single point of contention. LoRa radios can hop frequencies, but without coordination, nodes miss each other.

## Hardware requirement

**Works on ALL hardware.** Any LoRa chip can change frequency. Coordination is pure software.

## Solution

Split traffic across multiple channels:
1. **Control channel**: Announces, DIO, beacons (all nodes listen)
2. **Data channels**: Application traffic (hash-based or assigned)

Or: time-synchronized channel hopping (all nodes hop together).

## Channel plan (EU868 example)
- Control: 868.1 MHz
- Data 1: 868.3 MHz
- Data 2: 868.5 MHz
- Data 3: 867.1 MHz
(8 channels available in EU868 band)

## Coordination methods

1. **Static split**: Control on CH0, data on CH1-7 round-robin
2. **Hash-based**: data_channel = hash(src_iid, dst_iid) mod N
3. **Rendezvous**: Announce includes preferred RX channel
4. **Synchronized hopping**: All nodes follow same hop sequence

## Tradeoffs

- Nodes must coordinate or miss packets
- Gateway needs multi-channel RX (or fast hopping)
- Increases complexity but multiplies capacity

## Acceptance criteria

- Spec defines channel plan and coordination method
- Control/data split implemented
- 8-channel deployment shows ~8x capacity vs single channel","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:21:09.695334Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T18:21:09.695334Z","labels":["phy","scalability"]}

4. **Synchronized hopping**: All nodes follow same hop sequence

## Tradeoffs

- Nodes must coordinate or miss packets

- Increases complexity but multiplies capacity

## Acceptance criteria

- Spec defines channel plan and coordination method
- Control/data split implemented
- 8-channel deployment shows ~8x capacity vs single channel","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:21:09.695334Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T22:27:23.053585398Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T22:27:23.053585398Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T22:32:23.053585398Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T22:27:23.053585398Z","labels":["phy","scalability"]}

new_value: Multi-channel CCP (TDMA, adaptive SF, CAD/CCA in lora_l2+drivers, spec updates, test vectors, 3 codereview passes) complete per acceptance. Remaining open children filed as follow-ups.
